title: Extra Hoppers
description: Adds new, faster and upgradable hoppers to Minecraft
body:
Do you think hoppers are a bit slow? Then you should try this mod!

This mod adds varius types of hoppers to the game.

The hoppers are available in 3 Tiers:

- Normal (1 item per update)
- Plus (4 items per update)
- Plus Plus (8 items per update)

The amount of items transferred each update can be configured in the config. You can use the forge menu to change your local config.

But that isn't all! This mod also adds various variants of hoppers which have different update times:

- Honey Hopper (20 ticks/update)
- Copper Hopper (6 ticks/update)
- Golden Hopper (4 ticks/update)
- Diamond Hopper (2 ticks/update)
- Netherite Hopper (1 tick/update)

The hoppers are also available in 3 Tiers: Normal, Plus and Plus Plus.

This mod supports the following locales: en_us, de_de, es_es, fr_fr, it_it, ja_jp, pl_pl, ru_ru, sv_se, tr_tr, uk_ua





Credits:

- Thanks to M1F2C for creating the Textures and Models
